motor_id.label: Motor
motor_id.description: Joint this controller drives in open-loop speed/duty mode. Resolves to a joint IO on a Part added to the robot. Serialized to hardware.json at deploy.

mode.label: Mode
mode.description: SPEED uses rad/s (or driver-native units); DUTY uses a normalized [-1, 1] value.

max_speed.label: Max Speed
max_speed.description: Clamp for SPEED mode. Ignored in DUTY mode (clamped to [-1, 1]).

timeout_s.label: Command Timeout (s)
timeout_s.description: Watchdog timeout applied to every command; 0 uses the driver default.
